title: space_join and SpaceAddMember/UpdateMember missing empty guards
description: space.rs: (1) space_join: SpaceJoinInput::InviteCode(ic) and SpaceJoinInput::SpaceId(sid) not checked for empty string. (2) space_add_member/space_update_member: m.id and u.id member ID strings not guarded against empty. All produce malformed JMAP requests that the server must reject.
